summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of NRWTreff landing page redesign. All 16 specified features tested and working correctly. Age verification modal, header navigation, hero section, search functionality, feature tags, footer elements, mobile menu, and duplicate element checks all passed.
passed_tests: Age verification modal appears and 'Ich bin 18+' button works
Header shows NRWTreff logo with ROTZLICHT subtitle
Header has Städte, Kontakt, and 18+ buttons on desktop
Sub-navigation shows Girls, FKK Clubs, Rotzlicht.com
Hero shows 'Wo bist du, Süßer?' headline
Search bar with 'Stadt eingeben' placeholder and 'Suche' button
Search functionality works (typing city and submitting)
3 feature tags below search: Diskret, Performance, Verifiziert
Footer has large NRWTREFF ROTZLICHT branding
Footer has Girls and FKK Clubs links
Footer has Newsletter email input form with submit button
Footer has AGB, Datenschutz, Impressum links
Footer shows 'Keine Gewährleistung für Fakes' disclaimer
No duplicate elements anywhere on the page
Edge cases handled gracefully (empty search, invalid email)
